payload.primary_message: Deel automates tax compliance by guiding contractors to submit the correct tax forms based on location and entity type, eliminating administrative burden and misclassification risk.

An applicant tracking system (ATS) and recruiting CRM serve distinct purposes in hiring: the ATS manages active hiring processes while a recruiting CRM nurtures candidate relationships and builds talent pipelines, and they work best when connected together.
Automated US payroll system that ensures compliance and eliminates manual payroll work through built-in tax logic and filings.
Deel API enables customizable automation of global HR and payroll workflows with enterprise-grade security and scalability.
Automatically manage access across your organization as teams change, keeping permissions accurate and secure without manual intervention.
Deel handles the entire visa and immigration process for founders, removing uncertainty and complexity so they can confidently relocate to expand their business globally.

payload.primary_message: Deel transforms scattered informal people operations into structured, automated talent management that delivers measurable time savings and insights for global teams.
Deel consolidates HR and IT operations to eliminate manual device management and compliance overhead, freeing leadership to focus on strategic work.
Microblink consolidated fragmented HR systems into a single platform, eliminating manual workflows and reducing admin overhead while improving compliance across global operations.
Deel IT eliminates onboarding delays and security gaps by enabling new hires to start with full access on day one through pre-configured, centrally managed laptops.
Deel enables rapid global scaling and market entry by eliminating the time, cost, and compliance burden of establishing separate foreign entities.
Deel unified Gomboc's HR systems across US and international operations, eliminating manual admin work and reducing operational complexity as they scaled.

Deel enables rapid setup and management of compliant global payroll for distributed teams across 150+ currencies and countries from a single platform.

payload.primary_message: Deel launches an integrated AI Workforce platform with seven specialized AI agents designed to automate HR, payroll, and talent management tasks while ensuring compliance across 150+ countries.
AI-powered workflow automation platform enables operations teams to automate repetitive, high-volume tasks across disparate systems without requiring coding or IT support.
Deel unifies the entire global worker lifecycle from hiring through payroll on a single integrated platform, eliminating fragmentation costs.
Deel launches a stablecoin wallet embedded in its platform that allows global contractors to hold earnings in stable currency, earn rewards, and spend worldwide without managing multiple apps.
Deel launches Field Services to extend its workforce platform into operationally intensive, location-based field operations where standard HR infrastructure falls short.
